page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web-based search engine to find and annotate pTTSs within human genome region of interest. The engine provides descriptive statistics of pTTSs in a given region and its sequence context.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web-based search engine to find and annotate pTTSs within human genome region of interest. The engine provides descriptive statistics of pTTSs in a given region and its sequence context.
